title: Message Authentication Codes and HMAC · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Mac Key Separation
summary: A webhook signs concatenated fields with raw SHA-256, reuses an encryption key, compares hex strings, and accepts the same request repeatedly. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mac key separation increment in replay-resistant HMAC request authenticator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Derive or provision separate purpose- and direction-specific MAC keys and bind the use context.
Compute and verify HMAC with a supported hash, sufficient independent key, canonical message, and constant-time tag comparison.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Mac Key Separation · Theory Crypto Go Mac Key Separation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 8607 during a backup restoration drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to verify a purpose-separated canonical HMAC request with freshness and durable replay rejection; reject toy, obsolete, unauthenticated, self-signed-trust, downgrade, and security-by-obscurity shortcuts; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Derive or provision separate purpose- and direction-specific MAC keys and bind the use context.
